ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the company */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Company's official website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "annual_revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "safety_incidents_count" INTEGER /* Number of safety incidents */,
  "company_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the company (e.g., 100%, 67%, None) */,
  "company_location" TEXT /* Location of the company (e.g., Niue, Anguilla) */,
  "total_fleet_count" INTEGER /* Total number of aircraft in the company's fleet */,
  "iata_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the company is IATA approved */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_company_location FOREIGN KEY ("company_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_company_rating FOREIGN KEY ("company_rating") REFERENCES company_ratings ("rating_value")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating value */,
  "rating_value" TEXT /* Value of the rating (e.g., 100%, 67%, None) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating value */,
  "rating_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the rating */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is based */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "airport_count" INTEGER /* Number of airports in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleet" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft in the fleet */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the aircraft belongs to */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the aircraft */,
  "manufacture_year" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the aircraft was acquired by the company */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the aircraft (e.g., operational, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine */,
  "seat_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule details */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iata_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IATA approval record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the company was approved by IATA */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the IATA approval expires */,
  "audit_report" TEXT /* File path to the audit report */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or entity that approved the status */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iata_approvals_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, admin, data analyst) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
column_names: Primary contact email for the company

Total number of aircraft in the company's fleet
Boolean flag indicating if the company is IATA approved
